domain_positive_desc: This journey is consistent with valid passenger flow procedures.
domain_negative_desc: Negative journeys are rejected examples — passenger flows known to be invalid or unsafe. RPNI uses them as constraints to ensure the automaton never accepts these sequences.
domain_alphabet_note: Each row is one event in the passenger flow alphabet. The symbol is the action:outcome pair — Category and Description are metadata only and do not affect automaton learning.
domain_meta_desc: The non-terminal (DFA state) symbols used in the flow grammar. Rename any state; its key updates in the Visualization immediately. The Role is structural and cannot be changed.
